defaultTheme.--van-base-font-family:
blinkmacsystemfont, 'Helvetica Neue',
    helvetica, segoe ui, arial, roboto, 'PingFang SC', 'miui',
    'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft Yahei', sans-serif, -apple-system
defaultTheme.--van-price-integer-font-family:
avenir-heavy, pingfang sc, helvetica neue,
    arial, sans-serif

variables.desc: 环形进度未条激活颜色
variables.name: --van-circle-layer-color

variables.desc: 进度条枢中文字的颜色
variables.name: --van-progress-pivot-text-color

variables.desc: 筛选框占位提示文字颜色
variables.name: --van-list-view-placeholder-color

variables.desc: 筛选框占位提示文字颜色
variables.name: --van-grid-view-placeholder-color

variables.desc: 输入框占位提示文字颜色
variables.name: --van-fieldinput-placeholder-color

variables.desc: 输入框禁用态文字颜色
variables.name: --van-fieldinput-disabled-color

variables.desc: 输入框聚焦时边框颜色
variables.name: --van-fieldinput-focused-border-color

variables.desc: 输入框聚焦时边框宽度
variables.name: --van-fieldinput-focused-border-width

variables.desc: 输入框占位提示文字颜色
variables.name: --van-fieldtextarea-placeholder-color

variables.desc: 输入框禁用态文字颜色
variables.name: --van-fieldtextarea-disabled-color

variables.desc: 输入框禁止态文本颜色
variables.name: --van-stepper-input-disabled-text-color

variables.desc: 胶囊选中时的禁用边框颜色
variables.name: --van-capsules-item-active-disabled-border-color

variables.desc: 胶囊选中时的禁用背景色
variables.name: --van-capsules-item-active-disabled-background

variables.desc: 胶囊选中时的禁用字体颜色
variables.name: --van-capsules-item-active-disabled-color

variables.desc: 弹出层的内层三角箭头大小,如 1px
variables.name: --popup-arrow-size

variables.desc: 弹出层的外层三角箭头大小,如 1px
variables.name: --popup-outer-arrow-size

variables.desc: 弹出层的阴影效果,如 2px 2px 2px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)
variables.name: --popup-box-shadow

variables.desc: 弹出消息的自定义图标颜色
variables.name: --van-toast-custom-icon-color

variables.desc: 弹出消息的阴影效果，如  0px 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)
variables.name: --van-toast-box-shadow

variables.title: 基础字体
variables.name: --van-base-font-family
variables.value:
blinkmacsystemfont, 'Helvetica Neue',
    helvetica, segoe ui, arial, roboto, 'PingFang SC', 'miui',
    'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft Yahei', sans-serif, -apple-system

variables.name: --van-price-integer-font-family
variables.value:
avenir-heavy, pingfang sc, helvetica neue,
    arial, sans-serif

variables.desc: 布局内各元素之间的外间距, 如：1px
variables.title: 中等间距
variables.name: --van-space-base
